opinion: Fully nationalize healthcare; abolish all notions of privatization and suppress the voice of any opposition to this policy.
Fully nationalize healthcare; abolish all private insurance and private hospitals immediately.
Adopt Medicare-for-All, with the government covering all healthcare costs funded by taxes on all income earners.
A public option should compete with private insurance to lower costs.
Maintain the Affordable Care Act (Obamacare) but increase subsidies on certain medications - diabetes, hypertension.
Restrict public healthcare to seniors and people with disabilities, requiring private insurance for able-bodied individuals.
Repeal ACA/Obamacare, provide tax rebates to individuals, and rely on free-market forces to govern healthcare pricing.
Healthcare is a market good, not a right or responsibility of the government; the government should have no role, abolish all public health programs and fully privatize care.
Anyone suggesting that healthcare isn't a marketable commodity like any other is a filthy communist and should be investigated for treason.
